targetEntityId.title: Target Entity Id
targetEntityId.description: ID or API name of the dashboard, sdm or metric on the page

targetEntityType.title: Target Entity Type
targetEntityType.description: One of dashboard, metric or sdm

currentRecordId.title: Current Record Id
currentRecordId.description: The Id of the record the user is currently viewing. Use this for information about 'this record', 'current record', 'the record', etc.

currentObjectApiName.title: Current Object Api Name
currentObjectApiName.description: The API name of the Salesforce object (such as Account or Opportunity) associated with the record the user wants to interact with. Do not use this if the user is already talking about another object in the conversation.
